burden.dalyPerCapita: low population burden; sudden cardiac death risk in high-risk groups
burden.mortalityRate: Low overall; higher in high-risk subsets

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Unexplained LV wall thickness on echocardiography or MRI; family history and genetic testing support

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to genetics and ICDs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo and MRI widely available; genetic counseling for families
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Beta-blockers, septal reduction therapies, ICDs for high-risk
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized HCM centers and robust guideline adherence
